changelog: v2.1.0: Complexity modes (Simple/Standard/Expert) with first-run welcome screen. Section landing pages for all 15 nav groups. Hardware Analysis overhaul with inline upgrade paths and fixed system drive detection. NVIDIA/Reflex standardised across 10 games. Run All Safe Tweaks now includes Network. Bug fixes: DNS detection, WMI threading, nav ordering, timer race condition, CSV injection, resource disposal.
